metadata.description: Agent skills for Claude Code and compatible agents — workflow, design, Claude Code tooling, media, and writing

plugins.name: workflow-skills
plugins.description: Strategic thinking, planning, and implementation — brainstorm, spec, apex, oneshot

plugins.name: design-skills
plugins.description: Bootstrap projects, recommend design archetypes, and enforce DESIGN.md tokens across UI

plugins.name: claude-code-skills
plugins.description: Meta skills for configuring Claude Code itself — CLAUDE.md authoring, subagent creation

plugins.name: media-skills
plugins.description: Media conversion and polishing — file-to-Markdown, looping videos and audio

plugins.name: writing-skills
plugins.description: English writing for project documentation — brand voice, READMEs, grammar polish, AI-tell removal
